title: GMP Certificate Verification Workflow
alt: Six-step workflow for verifying GMP certificates against EudraGMDP

items.label: Locate the site
items.desc: Search the exact site address and authorisation number, not the company.

items.label: Match scope to product
items.desc: Confirm dosage form and activity are covered by the certificate.

items.label: Check validity dates
items.desc: Note inspection date and stated validity against the inspection cycle.

items.label: Search for SNCs
items.desc: Check non-compliance records separately; an active SNC is a stop signal.

items.label: Cross-reference the MIA
items.desc: Authorisation should align with certificate scope; mismatches are red flags.

items.label: Record the evidence
items.desc: Capture entry, date checked and reviewer, per ALCOA+.
